title: The Central University of Jharkhand
text_content: The Central University of Jharkhand +91 - 9304953708 pro@cuj.ac.in Press Release 2023 2024 2025 2026 NIRF NIRF Careers Placement Tender Samarth Login Employees Student Contact Go to Hindi Site Academics Research Policies NAAC Disclosure ILMS Latest Update Upcoming Conferences --- National Seminar on "Socio-political Flux in South Asia: Regime Change, Recalibrating Geopolitical Dynamics and Resetting Balance of Power" during 19-20 March 2026 --- 2 Days National Seminar on "GST 2.0 Sectoral Analysis, Digital Compliance and Consumption Shifts implication for Vikshit Bharat " in collaboration with ICSSR Organised by Dept. of Commerce and Financial Studies & Dept. of Business Administration during 19-20 March 2026 --- UGC e-samadhan Portal -- Women's Helpline No. 9304953701(Contact person-Dr. Nirmali Bordoloi) Welcome to Central University of Jharkhand The President of India gave assent to The Central Universities Act, 2009 that envisages establishing and incorporating universities for teaching and research in the various states. The Central University of Jharkhand came into being under this Act on 1st of March, 2009. The tor of the Central University of Jharkhand, Her Excellency, Shrimati Pratibha Devisingh Patil, appointed Dr. Darlando T. Khathing, an internationally renowned scientist and a distinguished academic administrator, as its first Vice Chancellor. CUJâs focus will be on research in cutting-edge technologies. CUJ Ph.D. Scholar Mr. Prashant Kumar from Energy Engineering Department bags SERB overseas visiting doctoral fellowship and will carry out research at Purdue University, USA Dr.Basudev Pradhan's group research on all-perovskite tandem solar cells with 32.3 % efficiency-highlighted in prestigious PV-Magazine Global 4 students from Department of Geoinformatics got selected to pursue their higher studies aboard (Virginia Tech, Universiti Putra Malaysia, London University Birkbeck, University of California Santa Barbara) Dr. Purabi Saikia and Dr. Amit Kumar (CUJ) published an article in Nature Ecology & Evolution (Impact factor: 19.1) with international collaborators on forest diversity gradients. Position is purely on temporary basis and coterminous with the project Department of Civil Engineering is conducting FDP on Sustainability Engineering Concepts and Approaches during 14th-19thJuly, 2025. I am sure that student at CUJ will be well placed to help build a better world in Jharkhand and beyond" Prof. Jean Dreze Co-author: Nobel Laureate Prof. Amartya Sen "CUJ students are most disciplined and inquisitive students I have ever met " Prof. Kalyan Chakraborty Professor of Economics, Emporia State University, USA "Commitment of IMBA student of CUJ using there rigorous training to improve the economy and the society is commendable. I am sure that this young people will be an inviable contributors at Indian businesses " Prof. Sanjay Singh Gaur NYU School of Professonal Studies "Students of CUJ get a balanced exposure to multiple disciplines. I am sure that each one of them shall bring laurels to the organisation they serve" Prof. Ramanuj Majundar IIM Kolkata Gallery Social Media Twitter Tweets by CENTRALUNIVERS7 Facebook Youtube CUJ News Letter
